items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

items.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.

items.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.lead_paragraph: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

items.title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
items.lead_paragraph: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.

items.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.

items.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

items.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
items.lead_paragraph: Learn how Jason Liu uses Codex to preserve context, manage complex projects, and help work continue beyond a single prompt.

items.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
items.lead_paragraph: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.

items.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.

items.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
items.lead_paragraph: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.

items.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
items.lead_paragraph: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.

items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

items.title: Anthropic forms $200 million partnership with the Gates Foundation
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: We’re partnering with the Gates Foundation to commit $200 million in grant funding, Claude usage credits, and technical support for programs in global health, life sciences, education, and economic mobility over the next four years.

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic opens Seoul and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem—with the enterprises, startups, and researchers behind some of the most ambitious deployments of Claude.
